resource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "de_table_logs" {
  name                       = "WNZL - Logging Logs - australiaeast"
  target_resource_id         = "${data.azurerm_storage_account.function_storage.id}/tableServices/default"
  log_analytics_workspace_id = "/subscriptions/b4381e2c-2621-493f-8f37-271204366fe2/resourceGroups/t1-syd-logs-logging-resources-nonprod-prg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/syd-customer-nonprod-logging-law"

  enabled_log {
    category_group = "allLogs"
  }
}

resource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "de_table_metrics" {
  name                       = "WNZL - Logging Metrics - australiaeast"
  target_resource_id         = "${data.azurerm_storage_account.function_storage.id}/tableServices/default"
  log_analytics_workspace_id = "/subscriptions/b4381e2c-2621-493f-8f37-271204366fe2/resourceGroups/t1-syd-logs-logging-resources-nonprod-prg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/syd-customer-nonprod-logging-law"

  metric {
    category = "Capacity"
    enabled  = true
  }

  metric {
    category = "Transaction"
    enabled  = true
  }
}
